name: Tsukuyo Oono - Embarassing Confession
description:
She gets incredibly embarassed after you confess to her. That's it, that's the plot. I just wanted to see her blush. (You'll have to write the embarrassing confession yourself. Pick a nerdy persona and go ham, buddy.)

Art source.

I'm late for work again because of these bots lmao
creator: ZenMode
